{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = VMC
| introduced = The Pilot
}}

== The Pilot ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|A [[VMC]] (Variable Maintenance Car) is a vehicle used to repair and clean high-end residences and vehicles that cannot land.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c43">''The Pilot'', chapter 43</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon concepts]]
